_comment: Positions ledger for report.py. The trading session maintains it: a buy APPENDS, a sell REMOVES. sleeve = swing|momentum (NO 'legacy' — every position is judged each run with a take-profit / trail / hold / thesis-check action; treat the book as an income / grow-the-balance portfolio). Stops are TRAILING: a winner carries a GTC stop ~15% below its running high, ratcheted UP only and never below entry, so it can only ever be sold for a locked-in gain; underwater names carry NO price stop and are thesis-managed (sell only if the thesis breaks, else cull at the monthly rebalance). Options positions (sleeve:'options') may carry a 'manual_hold_override' field to suspend ONLY the mechanical -50% price stop (see CLAUDE.md HARD RULE 8) — settable/clearable only by a genuinely interactive session with a real, live Ryan turn, never by an automated run (same bar as HARD RULE 9).

positions._note: Reconciliation (options-automation run, 19:38-19:52Z): placed_agent='user' on the fill (2026-07-20T19:38:22Z, $2.47/contract, $247 premium) -- Ryan bought this himself in the app, automation did not place it and was not consulted. Long-dated LEAP (18mo out, deep ITM-trending strike $5 vs underlying ~$5.30), a materially different risk profile than the sleeve's normal 30-45 DTE/~0.35-delta plays -- not gated by the HARD RULE 8 entry checklist since it wasn't an autonomous entry. Missing from the ledger until this run; added to match the broker, no trade action taken. FLAGGING FOR RYAN: this purchase pushed total options-sleeve mark value to ~$691 on a ~$3601 account (~19.2%), over the HARD RULE 8 ~15% sleeve cap (~$540) -- automation will skip new option entries until this comes back under cap. Mechanical -50%/+50-100% exit rules are not being auto-applied to this LEAP given the distinct risk profile and that Ryan placed it deliberately; flag if you want it treated differently.

positions.exit_plan: RYAN'S FAST-EXIT INSTRUCTION (live turn 2026-07-20: 'Do the call but, we need to sell once it pops meaningfully'): take profit at +50% premium (~$4.35) OR underlying tags ~$85.50 (20-day zone), WHICHEVER FIRST - do not ride toward +100%. Standard exits also apply: -50% cut (~$1.45) / broken thesis / DTE<14 (~Aug 7). Aug 21 expiry avoids early-Sept earnings. NOTE: $290 premium exceeds the ~$150/trade cap by Ryan's explicit override this session (account now ~$3.6k; position 7.9% of acct, within 15% sleeve). Entry stack: RSI2 oversold after 4 red closes at ~$79.26 in rising 200-day uptrend + thesis INTACT (Q1 FY27 +39% rev, ARR +32%, drop was sector multiple-compression) + liquidity (OI 904, spread 2.65/3.00) + IV 69% noted elevated.

positions._note: 2026-07-10: Ryan's in-app stop banked 2sh @123.50 (+$16); 2026-07-15: 1sh buyback @122.98 approved by Ryan (below the 123.50 exit; earnings 7/28 sized small). Blended basis.
2026-07-15: $50 add @133.05 approved by Ryan on the post-Q2 sell-the-news dip (Q2 beat, thesis intact). Blended basis.

Ryan, live turn 2026-07-20: 'Don't sell iren. Good stock just volatile due to the large rise in ai play. People just selling down for profit and risks but still a good longterm play' -- conviction long-term hold; reclassified swing->momentum so RSI2-bounce exits stop firing on it. Manage by thesis (HARD RULE 7) and the monthly rebalance only. Reconciled 2026-07-20T17:30Z (options-automation run): Ryan bought 5 more shares himself in-app (placed_agent=user, $40.195 fill, 2026-07-20T16:10Z) -- broker now shows 11.810007sh @ blended $42.99 avg cost; ledger drift fixed to match, no trade action taken by automation.

Swing leg of Ryan's 'do both' RBRK play (paired with the 8/21 90C). Same fast exit: bank the pop at ~85.50 / RSI2>=70; entry on the 4-red-close oversold at the 77-78 pullback zone, thesis INTACT. Distinct from the 1sh RKLB momentum position - do not confuse tickers.

_resolved_flags.resolution: Cleared per HARD RULE 9(a) by the interactive session that PLACED both orders: Ryan typed 'Approve' (real user turn, 2026-07-14 ~15:55Z) authorizing the presented batch (SELL CRWD 0.4sh / BUY LLY $150 / BUY MRK 1sh), and the fills match that batch exactly (MRK leg was rejected for buying power). The flagging run was correct to flag - it could not see this session. Ledger entries already match the broker.
